name: pablitomaestro-agi-appbuilder
description: Take any web idea or partially-completed repo through PRD → design exploration → scaffold → env bootstrap → autonomous execution → optional review → smoke test, until a production-ready app runs locally. Seven composable skills with strict contracts (worktrees, PR-merge-to-main, 3-tier tests, simplify pass) + observability via hooks. Cross-tool: works in Claude Code and Codex.
